title: polium supinum
intro: Polium supinum, also known as Polium fruit or Desert Olive, is a small shrub native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various gastrointestinal issues, including indigestion, nausea, and diarrhea, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and relax the muscles in the digestive tract. The health benefits of Polium supinum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve circulation, and act as an antioxidant, helping to protect the body from free radicals and oxidative stress. Polium supinum is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
